title: Israel-Lebanon Round 4 talks begin at State Department — Needham/Holler lead US side; Jun 2-3
snippet: Fourth round of Israel-Lebanon talks begins at State Department, June 2-3. Needham (recently promoted to deputy NSA) and Holler lead the US side. Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors present. Trump says he secured commitments of de-escalation from both sides. Talks proceed despite chaos of ceasefire announcement and contradiction.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 이스라엘-레바논 4차 워싱턴 회담 개시. src-1523에서 예고된 회담이 실제 개시. 니덤 부NSA 승진 후 첫 주도
